entries.name: RbPH3
entries.pressure_trigger: predicted synthesis at 30 GPa, ambient operation predicted
entries.go_forward_recommendation: Use as the primary hydride comparator for Phase 07 and an input family for Phase 08.

entries.name: Mg2IrH6
entries.pressure_trigger: Mg2IrH7 route above 15 GPa in Dolui 2024; ambient route disputed
entries.go_forward_recommendation: Use only with contradiction tracking; do not treat as settled.

entries.name: KB3C3
entries.pressure_trigger: ambient operation predicted; high-pressure synthesis route proposed
entries.go_forward_recommendation: Use as the strongest framework analog for ambient-retention logic.

entries.name: KRbB6C6
entries.go_forward_recommendation: Use as an ambient framework benchmark for Phase 08.

entries.name: PbNH4B6C6
entries.go_forward_recommendation: Use as a ceiling-setting framework target, but penalize for toxicity.

entries.name: SrB3C3
entries.pressure_trigger: synthesized near 57 GPa; sample survival close to ambient discussed
entries.go_forward_recommendation: Use as a cautionary analog showing that sample survival is not the same as ambient superconductivity.

entries.name: Hg1223
entries.pressure_trigger: pressure-quench protocol; exact trigger pressure not extracted here
entries.go_forward_recommendation: Use as the best proof of route class, not as direct hydride evidence.
